title: Horrible support group
body:
Just got off from a horrible support group. The therapist was constantly talking about herself, disclosed her own noncancer illness and how she learned to live with it, and we have to live with it. 

“The good thing is you have breast cancer, not some other cancer, there’s a lot of scholarships”

“Lots of people have ongoing medical issues, not just cancer. It sucks but you learn to live with it… I can’t wear high heels bcuz of my medical condition.”

When I complained about how my job and how people don’t understand, “just like they should give you grace, you need to give them grace cuz they have no way of understanding…”

“Radiation doesn’t have side effects til week 4…”

“If you didn’t do chemo, you’d be de^d” 

How does this woman have a job?
